name: linkup-mcp-server
description: Linkup MCP server for web search

tools.name: linkup-search
tools.description: Search the web in real time using Linkup to retrieve current information, facts, and news from trusted sources.

tools.name: linkup-research
tools.description: Start a long-running Linkup deep research task for complex, multi-source investigations. Returns a task id to poll with linkup-get-research.

tools.name: linkup-get-research
tools.description: Retrieve the status and result of a Linkup research task started with linkup-research.

tools.name: linkup-fetch
tools.description: Fetch and extract content from any webpage URL.

apiKey.title: Linkup API Key
apiKey.description: API Key needed to authenticate to Linkup's servers
